ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight #AI1234
ham.body:
Dear Arjun, 

Thank you for booking your flight with AirIndia Express. Below are the details of your upcoming trip:

• Flight Number: AI1234
• Date: 12th December 2026
• Departure: Mumbai (BOM) 08:45 AM
• Arrival: New Delhi (DEL) 10:15 AM
• Seat: 12A (Window)
• Baggage Allowance: 20kg checked + 7kg carry‑on

Please review the itinerary and let us know if any changes are required. For further assistance, you can reply to this email or call our support line at 1800-123-456.

Safe travels!

Best Regards,
AirIndia Express Team

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Pending – Action Required
spam.body:
Hello Suresh, 

It has come to our notice that your recent parcel (Tracking No: 987654321) was not successfully delivered by FedEx. As per our policy, a missed delivery incurs a fee of ₹1500. 

To avoid further delay, please complete the payment within 48 hours. Click the link below to process the payment securely: <URL> 

If you have already paid, kindly provide the transaction ID. 

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
FedEx Support Team
